findings.description: StreamingMedian._data grows unbounded across add() calls (and safe_mean/percentile/running_total fully materialize or sort arbitrary-length iterables), so a long-lived instance fed attacker-controlled unbounded input could exhaust memory (CWE-400 uncontrolled resource consumption); borderline and likely out of scope since no attacker-controlled-input vector is in scope and unbounded accumulation is the documented design of an exact streaming median.
